channel.title: Portfolio on My New Hugo Project
channel.description: Recent content in Portfolio on My New Hugo Project

item.title: Cross-Cultural AI Product User Cognition and Inclusive Design Research
item.description: Master’s thesis and survey project. Led a longitudinal study of 30 core users, conducted 50+ in-depth interviews and multi-round digital behavior monitoring, and established interaction need assessment dimensions for neurodiverse users (ADHD, social & reading disorders).

item.title: Theoretical Grounding: From Animism to Digital Materiality
item.description: Academic portfolio. Systematically traces theoretical threads from animism to digital materiality, exploring how technology reshapes human-world relations and how digital interfaces become social actors.

item.title: Digital Governance Product Mental Model Mismatch: Health Code System Case Study
item.description: Independent fieldwork project. Designed user voice collection protocol, built web scraper capturing 10K+ user feedback posts, established emotional evolution monitoring model and demand prioritization matrix, conducted 20+ in-depth interviews across 6 user personas.
